params.name: Mordan Bullet
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.07% chance), Novice Scrolls (1%), Wish (3.1%)
params.description:
On Apr 23, 1978, Mordan's daughter was killed by a bizarre bullet outside the battlefield.

This bullet was why Mordan betrayed the army. He used to be a highly-respected platoon commander, but when his daughter was brutally killed by a huge bullet, he decided to leave. Knowing that he could do nothing in the army, he resorted to betrayal to stop the war.
params.ss7:
Per Apostle defeated, Snail +15
Apostles defeated: 15/15
Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
